checks.name: api
findings: No API endpoints found at common paths
No GraphQL endpoint found
No CORS headers — API may not be accessible from browser-based agents
Server always returns HTML regardless of Accept header — no API content negotiation

checks.name: auth
findings: No bot detection systems detected
CAPTCHA detected: captcha
No OAuth/OIDC discovery endpoint found
Login form at /signin — complex, 24 inputs

checks.name: docs
findings: robots.txt blocks AI bots: anthropic, claude, ccbot
robots.txt references a sitemap
No sitemap.xml found
No OpenAPI/Swagger specification found
No JSON-LD structured data found
No llms.txt found (emerging standard for LLM-friendly docs)

checks.name: structure
findings: Heavy div usage: 537 divs with only 49 semantic elements
Poor accessibility: only 365/481 interactive elements have labels
Forms are well-structured: 7/7 inputs have names
Found 74 elements with stable test selectors
Very little content without JavaScript
Heading hierarchy has 1 level skip(s) (e.g., h1 → h3)
51 links with no text or aria-label — invisible to agents
Good link accessibility: 356/407 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors
findings: 404 returns HTML error page (not machine-readable)
No rate limit headers found
Unexpected status 404 for DELETE on main page

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~209,538 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 1% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 20 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~16,556 tokens (8% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.26–$3.14 per load ($1.31–$15.72 for a 5-page session)

checks.name: a11y
findings: Good landmark coverage: banner, complementary, contentinfo, main, navigation
All 88 images have alt attributes (60 descriptive, 28 decorative)
Found 1 skip link(s) — helps agents jump to main content
Found 16 live region(s) — agents can detect dynamic content changes
Found 8 elements with positive tabindex — may confuse agent tab navigation
19 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0
29 elements with tabindex=-1 (programmatic focus)

checks.name: performance
findings: Moderate response time: 844ms
Moderate payload: 819KB
1 redirect(s) — acceptable
Lean resources: 7 scripts, 2 styles, 90 images
Compression enabled: gzip
